validation.passwordLower: *Password must contain at least one lowercase letter

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters long

verifyDescription.text: Please enter the 6 digits code sent to your email

priceSection.title: Your trip for exactly the same price as the Station fare!
priceSection.description: Enjoy smart technology and affordable prices!

destinations.title: Popular Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Explore the most requested trips and book your seat now

safetySection.title: Your safety is our priority
safetySection.cardDescription: At Rydroo, we ensure that all drivers are officially registered and their licenses and roadworthiness are verified, to provide you with a safer and more organized experience compared to traditional stations!

socialImpact.title: Social Impact: Towards Sustainable Influence
socialImpact.description: We developed Rydroo to save your time and enhance your comfort while contributing to reducing emissions and energy conservation for a cleaner environment and a better quality of life.

radioSection.title: Now you can follow the latest road news instantly before you move!
radioSection.description: Through radio broadcasting technology, we bring you real-time traffic updates so you can stay safe and choose the best route before traveling.

authPopup.title: You must login first to book!
